title: ProvenanceLinkSet
description: A set of provenance links connecting a transaction or settlement to the AI artifacts, certificates, decisions, datasets, models, or outputs it funds. Links are immutable after the transaction reaches the `captured` status.

artifact_id.description: CertifiedData artifact identifier this payment funds.

certificate_id.description: CertifiedData certificate identifier linked to this transaction.

decision_id.description: DecisionLedger decision record identifier linked to this transaction.

dataset_id.description: Dataset identifier linked to this transaction.

model_id.description: Model identifier linked to this transaction.

output_id.description: AI output identifier linked to this transaction.

receipt_hash.description: SHA-256 digest of the canonical payment receipt payload (sha256: prefix). This is the provenance-level reference to the receipt, distinct from the receipt object's own id.

external_reference.description: Freeform external reference string (e.g. partner:invoice-44821). Max 128 characters.

provenance_metadata.description: Namespaced key-value metadata. Keys must use a recognized namespace prefix (cdp:, partner:, ext:). Max 20 keys, max 256 chars per value.
